title: Intellectual Property
description: Conroe ISD's intellectual property policy explains who owns creative works, inventions, and other original content created by employees and students using district resources or as part of their work for the district. It sets clear expectations about copyright, ownership rights, and how such materials may be used or shared. Understanding these guidelines helps students, staff, and community members know their rights and responsibilities when creating or using original work connected to the district.

timeline_local.summary: Conroe ISD is seeking board approval to enforce existing Policy CY (Local) related to Intellectual Property. The district plans to review vendors and organizations currently using CISD logos and brands, and contact those without a written agreement to regulate their use. This is not a policy text change — it is a request to actively enforce the existing policy.

### 10. Enforcement of Board Policy CY Local — Intellectual Property
Motion to formally enforce existing policy regarding district logos and branding; administration will review vendors/organizations currently using logos and contact those without written agreements.
**VOTE: Approved 7-0**

timeline_local.notes: This page is a proposal/cover memo, not a redline policy document. No policy text changes (additions or deletions) are presented. The action is enforcement of existing CY Local policy, recommended by Superintendent Dr. David Vinson. No first or second reading of new policy language is indicated.

description_local: This policy governs ownership and use of intellectual property — such as original materials, curricula, software, or creative works — developed by or for the school district. It primarily affects district employees, vendors, and contractors who create or contribute materials used in schools. Parents and community members should be aware of this policy because it shapes how educational resources are developed, protected, and shared, and ensures the district carefully manages the tools and content used in their children's education.
